docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL:BIFURCATED WI 6600 PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/WIT SWORN:ROBERT CASSIDY/X:THE COURT FINDS THERE IS PROBABLE CAUSE TO BELIEVE THAT: RESPONDENT MAURICE WRIGHT HAS BEEN CONVICTED OF A QUALIFYING SEXUALLY VIOLENT OFFENSE AGAINST AT LEAST ONE VICTIM; HAS A DIAGNOSABLE MENTAL DISORDER; THE DISORDER MAKES IT LIKELY HE WILL ENGAGE IN SEXUALLY VIOLENT CRIMINAL CONDUCT IF RELEASED; AND THIS SEXUALLY VIOLENT CRIMINAL CONDUCT WILL BE PREDATORY IN NATURE,//CTORD:THE DEFENDANT IS TO REMAIN IN THE CUSTODY OF THE SHERIFF OF THE  CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO FOR IMMEDIATE TRANSFER TO COALINGA STATE HOSPITAL OR INSTITUTION DESIGNATED BY THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF STATE HOSPITALS,/X:FINDINGS AND ORDER AFTER PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING, SIGNED AND FILED/CONTD:TO SET TRIAL/
